'''Zeb Maddaan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] member of the [[Republic Correctional Officers' Union]] in the years before the [[Rally on Naboo/Legends|Uprising on Naboo]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was arrested and sent to the [[Oovo IV/Legends|Oovo IV's]] [[Desolation Alley|prison]] for stealing large cash holdings from some of [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan's]] less respectable but equally important clients. However, the Banking Clan had also placed a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on Maddaan's head, and he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
